title: MWBECertificationApplication
description: An application for NYC SBS business certification (M/WBE, EBE, or LBE) — the flagship SBS business transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for the application itself; today a business applies only inside the session-bound MyCity Business portal (nyc-business.nyc.gov) / PASSPort. Once approved, the business appears in the 'SBS Certified Business List' (ci93-uc8s). This schema serves both the read surface (list/get an owner's own applications) and the write surface (submit an application).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application/case number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by SBS, not the applicant.

certificationRequested.description: Which certification the business is applying for.

einOrTin.description: Federal EIN / TIN of the business.

ownershipPercent.description: Percent owned by the qualifying owner(s).

businessDescription.description: Description of the goods/services the business provides.
